raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta runna tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ un fakka: Schee Laudie
runna/ tas Laiks ne irr atgahjis
ta KUNGA Mammu uszelt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Wahrdē
notifke zaur to Praueetu Agga-
ju/ kas fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Arrig tad preeksch juws
Laiks irr/ ka juhs skaitstōs Nam-
mōs dshwojat/ un schim Nam-
man buhs pohstā stahweht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ ta fakka tas
KUNGS Zebaot: Apdohmajt
tawus Zettus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juhs fehjat dauds/ un
weddat mas eekscha/ juhs ehdat/
bet ne pee-ehdat/ juhs dseerat/
bet ne peedseratees. Juhs ap-
tehrpjatees/ bet ne warrat fasil-
ditees/ un kas Algu peln/ tas
dabbu winnu zaarumaiaad
Makka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot: Apdohmajt tawus Zet-
tus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Uskahpeet Kalnōs/ un at-
weddeet Malku / un ustaifajt
icho Rammu/ tad man pee ta
buhs labs Prahts/ un es tapschu
pagohdinahts/fakka tas KUNgs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juhs gan gaidat us dauds/
bet raugt/ juhs dabbujat mas/
un jepshu juhs to effeet Mahjas
neffuschi/ tatschu es to isputti-
naju. Rapehz ta? fakka tas
KUNgs Zebaot: Manna Nam-
ma labbad / kas pohstā stahw /
tomehr juhs dsennatees uhs fa-
wu Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht aisturr juws ta
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es etmu to Bullu
zinajs pahr to Semmi/ un
Rālneem/ un pahr Labbibu/
pahr Wihnu/ un pahr Eri/
pahr to/ kam bij no Sem
ja-isang/ un pahr Zilwekeem
pahr Lohveem / un pahr w
Robkas Darbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Seruba-
Sealtiēta Dehis/ un Jos
Jozadaka Dehis/ tas au
Preesteris/ un wiſſi attiffi
Landis tai Balkfnet ta RU
GA fawa Deewa/ un t
Wahrdeem ta Praueeta Ag
jus/ itt ka winnu tas KUNG
winna Deews bij fuhtijs/ u
Landis bihjajahs preeksch
KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Aggajus
Webstuetis ta KUNGA/ ka
KUNGA Websts bija uhs t
Laudim/ un fazzija: Es e
ar jus/ fakka tas KUNG
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS
mohdinaja to Garru Serub
la Sealtiēta Dehta/ ta W
neeka Juhda/ un to Garru
sus Jozadaka Dehta/ ta au
Preestera/ un to Garru n
atlikluscho Lanschu/ ka tee
ze/ un padarrija to Darbu ee
ta Naimma ta KUNGA Ze-
tawa Deewa.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
